545 O0500G_DRSG_TRNG_NUM O0500G_DRSG_TRNG_NUM O0500G Restorative Nursing: Dressing/Grooming Training Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received dressing and/or grooming training for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
